name: [YAOC2 Sandbox] OpenCTI Sync
_doc: Sandbox workflow for action: opencti_sync. Called by the policy gateway after an allow/approval decision. Receives a STIX bundle or structured intel object from parameters, validates it, and imports it into OpenCTI via the STIX2 bundle import API. Returns structured result to gateway.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: 'mutation ImportBundle($bundle: String!) { stixBundleImport(input: { file: $bundle }) { id } }', variables: { bundle: JSON.stringify($json.stix_bundle) } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ query: `query GetObject($id: String!) { stixObjectOrStixRelationship(id: $id) { id standard_id ... on BasicObject { entity_type } } }`, variables: { id: $json.object_id } }) }}
